message:
feat(storage): tick 173 account + reservation + action-undo clusters route through send_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Twenty-fourth post-storage tick. 7 more `_with_cx` writes inlined.

Migrated:
- Account cluster (tick 144, 3 methods):
  * upsert_account_with_cx
  * update_account_last_used_with_cx
  * delete_account_with_cx
- Reservation cluster (tick 145, 3 methods):
  * create_reservation_with_cx
  * release_reservation_with_cx
  * expire_stale_reservations_with_cx
- Action-undo (tick 148, 1 method + 1 composite):
  * upsert_action_undo_with_cx — leaf write
  * upsert_action_undo_redacted_with_cx already routes through
    upsert_action_undo_with_cx (tick 148 shipped it that way), so
    it now transitively bypasses the orphan — no change needed here.

Running tally of cx-first write methods routing through send_with_cx:
- Tick 169: 6 (event-annotation)
- Tick 170: 6 (saved-search + pane-bookmark)
- Tick 171: 6 (notification + vacuum/checkpoint)
- Tick 172: 8 (token-lifecycle + mux-session)
- Tick 173: 7 (account + reservation + action-undo)
- Total: 33 / ~60+ migrated

Verified via fork bypass: 496/496 storage:: tests pass, including
cluster roundtrip gates from ticks 144/145/148.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
